stemHtml: The base of the stratosphere is situated where heating by conduction from above and convection from below balance out. It is..

options.a: more or less constant over the globe as there is always an equilibrium between lower- and upper-atmospheric heat fluxes.
options.b: lower in the equatorial region due to the Equatorial Low Pressure Trough.
options.c: higher at higher latitudes due to the constant high-pressure area.
options.d: lower near the poles because of lower ground temperatures.
